abstract: Comprehensive Laravel AI SDK guide for AI agents and LLMs. Contains 17 rules across 7 categories covering agent creation and configuration, custom and provider tools, embeddings and vector search, image and audio generation, file and vector store management, and testing with fakes and assertions. All examples use PHP 8.3 syntax and Laravel 13 conventions.

categories.name: Agents
categories.description: Creating, configuring, and prompting AI agents

categories.name: Tools
categories.description: Custom tools and provider tools for agents

categories.name: Embeddings & Search
categories.description: Vector embeddings, similarity search, and reranking

categories.name: Files & Storage
categories.description: File storage with providers and vector stores for RAG

categories.name: Testing
categories.description: Faking AI responses and asserting prompts in tests

keyFeatures: Agent classes with instructions, tools, and structured output
Streaming responses with SSE and Vercel AI SDK protocol
Custom tools with JSON schema validation
Provider tools: WebSearch, WebFetch, FileSearch, SimilaritySearch
Image generation with storage and queueing
File and vector store management for RAG
Comprehensive faking and assertion API for testing
